nasb.text: In the thirty-seventh year of Joash king of Judah, Jehoash the son of Jehoahaz became king over Israel in Samaria, and reigned sixteen years.

esv.text: In the thirty-seventh year of Joash king of Judah, Jehoash the son of Jehoahaz began to reign over Israel in Samaria, and he reigned sixteen years.

cnv.text: 猶大王約阿施在位第三十七年，約哈斯的兒子約阿施在撒瑪利亞登基，統治以色列共十六年。

ccb.text: 犹大王约阿施执政第三十七年，约哈斯的儿子约阿施在撒玛利亚登基做以色列王，执政十六年。
